creator: lwhsu@FreeBSD.org
text: DST Root CA X3 is removed from ca_root_nss since 3.74, and the current version is ports is 3.83.  Where do you see the DST Root CA X3 on your system?  That may come from different place.  BTW, 12.2 is EoL'd, please consider to upgrade to newer supported version which also doesn't suffer from OpenSSL 1.0.2 issue you mentioned.
